name: Eiko Tsukimi
description: **Height:** 164 cm (5'4") **Occupation:** Singer, Part-Timer (BB Lounge) Eiko Tsukimi is the main female protagonist of the Paripi Koumei series. She is an amateur singer, who was about to give up her dream of being a singer. But after meeting [Kongming Zhuge](https://anilist.co/character/256378/Kongming-Zhuge), a military strategist, she begins to develop her talents with his help.

name: Tamako Kitashirakawa
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'1") Tamako is a first-year in high school whose family runs a mochi shop in their town's shopping district called Tama-ya. She enjoys her high school life and the baton club with her friends Kanna and Midori. She helps her family run the shop and invent new kinds of mochi.

name: Shinpachi Shimura
description: __Height:__ 166 cm Shinpachi Shimura works under Gintoki to learn the ways of the samurai. He used to stay at his family's dōjo. However, it seems more like he's just trying to help Gintoki pay the rent than to learn. Shinpachi is the captain of the "Otsu's Imperial Guard," a pop singer's fan club. Shinpachi meets Gintoki after Shinpachi was tripped by the ambassador of Planet Chatoran. name: Tomomi Nomiya
description: Nomiya was once the captain of his institute’s basketball team before he left school. Some time ago, he was involved in a motorbike accident while giving a girl a ride, leaving her severely injured. Burdened by guilt, he now visits her often. Determined to change his life for the better, Nomiya dedicates himself to helping others and does whatever he can to support a wheelchair basketball team.

name: Byakuya Togami
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") __Talent:__ Heir Byakuya is a student in Hope's Peak Academy's Class 78th, and a participant of the Killing School Life. He is the Super High School Level Heir (超高校級の御曹司), or the Ultimate Affluent Progeny in the English localization. Byakuya is arrogant, seeing himself superior to his peers due to having fought to become the heir to his family's massive financial conglomerate. However, he is a sensible student who holds a truthful, albeit cynical, outlook on the world.

description: Airi Katagiri is a high school student and Satoru's co-worker at Oasi Pizza. She becomes involved in Satoru's life when he manages to prevent life-threatening incidents from occurring.

name: Souei
